lines.speaker: Captain Malleta
lines.text: Adventurer. The General warned us about you.

lines.speaker: Captain Malleta
lines.text: Yes. He said you might show up here again. We're not to harm you, but make no mistake, we're keeping a close eye on you. You're not to be trusted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I guess that's the best I can hope for. So how are things going here?

lines.speaker: Captain Malleta
lines.text: We are not here to make small talk. Leave us to our work.

sections.title: Standard dialogue before completing Desert Treasure II

lines.speaker: Captain Malleta
lines.text: You again? As I told you before, we are not here to make small talk. Leave us to our work.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after completing Desert Treasure II

lines.speaker: Captain Malleta
lines.text: I already told you to stop bothering us. Please go away.
